_schema.description: Comprehensive item catalog extracted from ServUO Scripts/Items/. One entry per concrete item class. item_id resolved from constructors/base chains; name from a base("...")/Name literal, a LabelNumber cliloc, or a humanized class name (see name_source). PNGs are static art from artLegacyMUL.uop keyed by item id and shared with crafting icons.

fields.png: static art path, or null if no art entry exists
